description: Comfort and style rolled into one - that's playboy for you. Revel in the comfort of flip flops with this stylish pair from Playboy. Upper Synthetic leather straps with stitch detailing on the upper and twill fabric inner lining for absolute abrasion-free comfort Twill fabric toe separator to hold the foot in place with much ease and comfort Soft, cushioned rubber footbed with a classic polka dot print and brand logo in blue and black for absolute style and comfort Footbed mildly curved at the back inner arch near the heel for ergonomic comfort Oustole Single piece flexible and cushioned rubber footbed and outsole for all-day comfort Brand bunny face logo-styled lugs throughout the footbed for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
